goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of 'nightclub'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should go to 'stevenage' and should leave on 'saturday'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 16:30'.
Make sure you get 'travel time', 'train ID', and 'price'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the type of nightclub
Make sure you get phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to stevenage and should leave on saturday
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave after 16:30
Make sure you get travel time, train ID, and price
